base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sword_beam_flashing_rope — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1986 legend of zelda. Sword-beam / flashing-rope palette cycle example. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Sword-beam / flashing-rope palette cycle example; 5 frames of color-shift illustrating palette-cycle trick used for invulnerable-enemy flash
